text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Thursday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, March 13. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. Great update. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that looking over our mortgage options. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Budget tracking is updated. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Researching rover power systems in depth. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds critical. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Let's break this down. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds like a sweet moment. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. I can run some projections for you. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: I can help with that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, I'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Busy day at Vertex Health. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
